response.overview: Uphold pending transactions usually clear in 【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】 minutes or within 24 hours. Bank payments may take several business days, and crypto transfers depend on network confirmations. 【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】 If your transaction remains pending beyond 48 hours, check its status and contact Uphold Support.  How long Uphold pending takes depends on the transaction type. 【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】  Crypto transfers often complete within minutes after network confirmations, while bank transfers may require 1–5 business days.【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】  Delays can happen because of security checks or network congestion.  A pending status on Uphold means your transaction is still 【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】 being verified or processed. Most transactions finish within 24 hours, but withdrawal methods,【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】  payment providers, and blockchain traffic can extend the processing time.
